company.segment_en: The owner of the AI build-out's binding constraint — ~50-60% of HBM (EST), sold out through 2026, and the ONLY Tier-V name that is TSMC's complement rather than TSMC's customer
company.segment_zh: AI 建置綁定約束的擁有者 — 約 50-60% 的 HBM 市占（估計），2026 全年售罄，也是 Tier V 七家中唯一「台積電的互補者、而非台積電的客戶」
company.blurb_en: Four pillars on the memory company the platform's own findings converge on: how SK hynix raises realized compute price (HBM3E→HBM4 generational ASP · sold-out LTA allocation · custom base dies · conventional-DRAM spillover) with NAND honestly weak and Samsung/Micron/CXMT pushing back · what to watch it with · its ~$25B HBM run-rate (DERIVED estimate) inside disclosed total revenue · and the twist: memory dies never touch a TSMC fab, yet TSMC CoWoS and SK HBM gate each other — 互補而非客戶.
company.blurb_zh: 對「平台自身結論所收斂的那家記憶體公司」的四支柱：SK海力士怎麼提高已實現算力售價（HBM3E→HBM4 世代 ASP · 售罄的 LTA 配額 · 客製 base die · 傳統 DRAM 外溢），NAND 誠實地弱、三星/美光/CXMT 反推 · 用什麼觀察 · 其 ~$25B HBM 年化（推導估計）藏在已揭露總營收內 · 以及反轉：記憶體晶粒從不進台積電晶圓廠，但台積電 CoWoS 與 SK HBM 互相把關 — 互補而非客戶。

thesis_en: SK hynix owns the thing everyone else on this board queues for: /bottleneck names HBM supply the binding constraint of deliverable compute (1.72M B200-eq accelerators/qtr, 對齊 /bottleneck 2026-07-02), and SK hynix holds ~50-60% of HBM (EST). Realized price rises through the HBM3E 12-hi → HBM4 generational ASP ladder (HBM4 premium ~50-60%, press EST), capacity sold out through 2026 under year-ahead LTAs, custom base-die co-design, and conventional-DRAM tightening as AI absorbs wafers. Honest drags: NAND is a weak lever, and Samsung/Micron catch-up plus CXMT (the /geo China-DRAM thread) is structural — memory pricing power is cyclical, so the score sits at 71.4, below NVDA 75.0 / AVGO 73.8 (full-stack price-setters) and above AMD 68.3. The TSMC twist: SK hynix is a COMPLEMENT, not a customer — its stacks are consumed on TSMC CoWoS interposers, the two gate each other, and only the HBM4 base die makes it a TSMC logic customer at all. Its capacity ramp RELIEVES the platform's binding constraint.
thesis_zh: SK海力士擁有這個平台上其他所有人都在排隊等的東西：/bottleneck 判定 HBM 供給是可交付算力的綁定約束（每季 172 萬顆 B200 當量加速器，對齊 /bottleneck 2026-07-02），而 SK海力士握有約 50-60% 的 HBM（估計）。已實現價格靠 HBM3E 12層 → HBM4 的世代 ASP 階梯（HBM4 溢價約 50-60%，媒體估計）、2026 全年在一年期 LTA 下售罄的產能、客製 base die 共同設計、以及 AI 吸走晶圓後傳統 DRAM 的緊縮外溢推升。誠實的拖累：NAND 是弱槓桿，三星/美光追趕加上 CXMT（/geo 的中國 DRAM 線）是結構性的 — 記憶體定價權有循環性，因此分數 71.4，低於 NVDA 75.0／AVGO 73.8（全堆疊定價者）、高於 AMD 68.3。台積電反轉：SK海力士是互補者、不是客戶 — 它的堆疊在台積電 CoWoS 中介層上被消耗，兩者互相把關，只有 HBM4 base die 讓它勉強成為台積電邏輯客戶。它的產能爬坡「紓解」的正是平台的綁定約束。

headline.verdict_zh: RAISING — 已實現算力售價擴張

pricing.verdict_zh: RAISING — 已實現算力售價擴張

levers.name_zh: HBM 世代 ASP 階梯（HBM3E 12層 → HBM4）
levers.mechanism_en: Each HBM generation resets price far above the one it replaces: HBM3E 8-hi → 12-hi (36GB) stepped ASP up, and HBM4 (2,048-bit I/O, 12-hi first, mass-production readiness completed Sep 2025) is press-reported to carry a ~50-60% premium over HBM3E (EST). Because every next-gen accelerator (Rubin, MI400) REQUIRES the next HBM generation, the mix forcibly migrates to the highest-ASP part — realized $/GB rises even as commodity DRAM $/GB deflates long-run.
levers.mechanism_zh: 每一代 HBM 都把價格重置到遠高於上一代：HBM3E 8層 → 12層（36GB）已把 ASP 推上一階，HBM4（2,048-bit I/O、12層先行、2025 年 9 月完成量產準備）據媒體報導對 HBM3E 有約 50-60% 溢價（估計）。因為每一代新加速器（Rubin、MI400）都「必須」用下一代 HBM，產品組合被迫遷移到最高 ASP 的產品 — 即使商品 DRAM 每 GB 長期通縮，已實現 $/GB 仍上升。
levers.observability_en: HBM4 vs HBM3E price-premium estimates (TrendForce-class), DRAM revenue ÷ bit shipments (blended ASP) in quarterly results, HBM share-of-DRAM-revenue commentary.
levers.observability_zh: HBM4 vs HBM3E 溢價估計（TrendForce 級）、季報 DRAM 營收 ÷ 位元出貨（混合 ASP）、HBM 占 DRAM 營收比例的法說評論。
levers.source_en: SK hynix earnings; TrendForce HBM pricing research
levers.source_zh: SK海力士法說；TrendForce HBM 價格研究

levers.name_en: Sold-out allocation power (year-ahead LTAs, 2026 capacity gone)
levers.name_zh: 售罄的配額權力（一年期 LTA，2026 產能已清空）
levers.mechanism_en: Management disclosed 2026 HBM capacity is effectively SOLD OUT via year-ahead long-term agreements negotiated with each customer — with prepayment/commitment structures press-reported for anchor buyers (T3). When the constraint's owner allocates rather than bids, price is set at negotiation, not eroded through the year — the memory version of NVIDIA's scarcity premium, and the strongest hard-disclosed lever.
levers.mechanism_zh: 管理層揭露 2026 年 HBM 產能已透過與各客戶逐一議定的一年期長約實質售罄 — 錨定買家的預付/承諾結構有媒體報導（T3）。當約束的擁有者用「分配」而非「競價」出貨，價格在議約時就定好、不會在年中被侵蝕 — 這是 NVIDIA 稀缺溢價的記憶體版本，也是揭露基礎最硬的槓桿。
levers.observability_en: Sold-out language on earnings calls, LTA/prepayment disclosures and press reports, HBM capex guidance (M15X ramp), customer inventory-commitment lines in NVIDIA/AMD filings.
levers.observability_zh: 法說會的「售罄」措辭、LTA／預付揭露與報導、HBM capex 指引（M15X 爬坡）、NVIDIA/AMD 財報中的客戶存貨承諾項。

levers.name_en: Conventional-DRAM tightening spillover (AI absorbs the wafers)
levers.name_zh: 傳統 DRAM 緊縮外溢（AI 吸走晶圓）
levers.mechanism_en: HBM consumes ~3x the wafer area per bit of standard DRAM, so every HBM ramp removes conventional supply. With AI servers also pulling DDR5/MRDIMM, server-DRAM contract prices surged through late 2025 into 2026 (TrendForce-class indices) — a memory supercycle where the SAME fabs earn more on both the AI product and the starved commodity one. This lever is cyclical: it mean-reverts when capex catches up.
levers.mechanism_zh: HBM 每位元耗掉約 3 倍於標準 DRAM 的晶圓面積，因此每次 HBM 爬坡都在抽走傳統供給。加上 AI 伺服器同步拉動 DDR5/MRDIMM，伺服器 DRAM 合約價自 2025 年末漲進 2026（TrendForce 級指數）— 一場記憶體超級循環：同一批晶圓廠在 AI 產品與被抽乾的商品產品上同時多賺。此槓桿有循環性：capex 追上時會均值回歸。
levers.observability_en: DRAM contract & spot price indices (TrendForce/DRAMeXchange), server-DDR5 contract-price QoQ moves, DRAM revenue mix in quarterly results.
levers.observability_zh: DRAM 合約與現貨價指數（TrendForce/DRAMeXchange）、伺服器 DDR5 合約價季環比、季報中的 DRAM 營收結構。

levers.name_en: Custom / base-die differentiation (HBM4 base die → logic process)
levers.name_zh: 客製／base die 差異化（HBM4 base die → 邏輯製程）
levers.mechanism_en: From HBM4 the base (logic) die moves to a foundry logic process — SK hynix partnered with TSMC (2024 MOU) to build it, and custom-HBM programs co-design that die with the accelerator vendor (controller/PHY functions pulled in). Customization converts a commodity stack into a socketed, co-engineered part: switching costs rise, second-sourcing gets harder, and value capture per stack goes up — the same 'custom silicon' economics Broadcom runs, applied to memory.
levers.mechanism_zh: 從 HBM4 起，base（邏輯）die 移到晶圓代工邏輯製程 — SK海力士與台積電合作（2024 MOU）生產，而客製 HBM 專案更與加速器廠商共同設計該晶粒（把控制器/PHY 功能拉進來）。客製化把商品化的堆疊變成有插槽、共同工程的零件：轉換成本上升、第二供應商更難、每個堆疊的價值捕獲提高 — 等於把博通的「客製矽」經濟學搬進記憶體。
levers.observability_en: TSMC-SK hynix base-die partnership milestones, custom-HBM design-win announcements, base-die node attribution in teardowns (TechInsights).
levers.observability_zh: 台積電-SK海力士 base die 合作里程碑、客製 HBM 設計勝出公告、拆解報告中的 base die 節點歸因（TechInsights）。
levers.source_en: SK hynix-TSMC partnership announcement; trade press
levers.source_zh: SK海力士-台積電合作公告；產業媒體

levers.name_zh: 三星／美光／CXMT 追趕（負向槓桿）
levers.mechanism_en: The share that underwrites allocation power is under structural attack: Samsung is pushing HBM4 requalification to reclaim share, Micron is ramping HBM3E/HBM4 capacity, and CXMT — the China-DRAM catch-up thread /geo tracks (對齊 /geo 2026-07-02) — floods conventional DRAM first and aims at HBM next. Every point of share lost weakens the sold-out LTA lever; memory history says duopoly-plus-one premiums compress once a third qualified source ships at volume.
levers.mechanism_zh: 支撐配額權力的市占正受結構性攻擊：三星力推 HBM4 重新驗證以奪回市占，美光加速 HBM3E/HBM4 產能，而 CXMT — /geo 追蹤的中國 DRAM 追趕線（對齊 /geo 2026-07-02）— 先淹沒傳統 DRAM、下一步瞄準 HBM。每失一個百分點市占，售罄 LTA 槓桿就弱一分；記憶體歷史說明：一旦第三家通過驗證的供應商量產出貨，雙寡頭加一的溢價就會壓縮。
levers.observability_en: NVIDIA/AMD HBM qualification news per vendor, TrendForce HBM share estimates, CXMT capacity/node reports (/geo second-chain read), Samsung HBM4 milestones.
levers.observability_zh: 各家 HBM 通過 NVIDIA/AMD 驗證的新聞、TrendForce HBM 市占估計、CXMT 產能/節點報導（/geo 第二供應鏈判讀）、三星 HBM4 里程碑。

levers.name_en: NAND / eSSD (Solidigm) — the honestly weak lever
levers.mechanism_en: AI data centers do lift high-capacity eSSD demand (QLC nearline via Solidigm), and NAND pricing recovered into 2026 — but NAND has more suppliers, weaker technology stratification and no HBM-style qualification moat. SK hynix takes price here more than it makes price. Kept in the stack for honesty: it dilutes, not drives, the blended realized-price story.
levers.mechanism_zh: AI 資料中心確實拉動大容量 eSSD 需求（Solidigm 的 QLC 近線儲存），NAND 價格也回升進 2026 — 但 NAND 供應商更多、技術分層更弱、沒有 HBM 式的驗證護城河。SK海力士在這裡接受價格多於制定價格。為誠實而保留在堆疊中：它稀釋、而非推動混合已實現價格的故事。
levers.observability_en: NAND contract price indices, eSSD share commentary, Solidigm results inside SK hynix consolidated filings.
levers.observability_zh: NAND 合約價指數、eSSD 市占評論、SK海力士合併報表內的 Solidigm 表現。
levers.source_en: TrendForce NAND research; SK hynix filings
levers.source_zh: TrendForce NAND 研究；SK海力士財報

pricing.engine_note_en: the HBM3E→HBM4 generational ASP ladder plus sold-out, LTA-locked allocation are doing the work — the constraint's owner prices the queue rather than chasing it, though memory cyclicality and Samsung/Micron/CXMT catch-up cap how far
pricing.engine_note_zh: HBM3E→HBM4 世代 ASP 階梯加上售罄、LTA 鎖定的配額在推動 — 約束的擁有者替排隊的人定價、而非追價，但記憶體循環性與三星/美光/CXMT 追趕限制其上限

items.what_en: Total & DRAM revenue, operating profit, HBM share-of-DRAM commentary — the hard floor for the benefit math; note: NO HBM segment line is reported.
items.what_zh: 總營收與 DRAM 營收、營業利益、HBM 占 DRAM 比例的評論 — 利益推導的硬底；注意：並無 HBM 分部揭露項。

items.name_en: SK hynix earnings calls & IR presentations
items.name_zh: SK海力士法說會與投資人簡報
items.what_en: Sold-out / LTA language, HBM4 ramp timing, capex framing, custom-HBM commentary — where the allocation-power lever is actually disclosed.
items.what_zh: 「售罄」／LTA 措辭、HBM4 爬坡時程、capex 框架、客製 HBM 評論 — 配額權力槓桿真正被揭露的地方。

items.name_en: DRAM contract & spot price indices (TrendForce / DRAMeXchange)
items.name_zh: DRAM 合約與現貨價指數（TrendForce／DRAMeXchange）
items.what_en: Server-DDR5 contract price moves and DRAM spot — the conventional-spillover lever's direct gauge, and /pricing's memory-premium input (對齊 /pricing 2026-07-02).
items.what_zh: 伺服器 DDR5 合約價變動與 DRAM 現貨 — 傳統外溢槓桿的直接量規，也是 /pricing 記憶體溢價的輸入（對齊 /pricing 2026-07-02）。

items.what_en: The ~50-60% SK hynix HBM share (EST) that underwrites allocation power — third-party estimates, no vendor reports HBM share.
items.what_zh: 支撐配額權力的 SK海力士約 50-60% HBM 市占（估計）— 全為第三方估計，沒有任何一家廠商揭露 HBM 市占。

items.name_zh: Capex 指引與晶圓廠建設（M15X、龍仁）
items.what_en: HBM capacity ramp = the relief valve on the platform's binding constraint — M15X (Cheongju) and the Yongin cluster set how fast the HBM ceiling lifts (對齊 /bottleneck 2026-07-02).
items.what_zh: HBM 產能爬坡＝平台綁定約束的洩壓閥 — M15X（清州）與龍仁聚落決定 HBM 天花板抬升多快（對齊 /bottleneck 2026-07-02）。

items.what_en: Year-ahead HBM agreements, press-reported prepayments, and the purchase-commitment lines in NVIDIA/AMD filings — the demand side of the sold-out claim.
items.what_zh: 一年期 HBM 協議、媒體報導的預付款、以及 NVIDIA/AMD 財報中的採購承諾項 — 「售罄」宣稱的需求端證據。

items.what_en: Which vendor's HBM sits on which accelerator, stack height, and base-die node attribution — the ground truth behind share and custom-die claims.
items.what_zh: 哪家的 HBM 落在哪顆加速器上、堆疊層數、base die 節點歸因 — 市占與客製晶粒宣稱背後的實物真相。

items.what_en: Live KRX price — the market's real-time read on the memory supercycle. Sentiment context only, kept OUT of the pricing-power score.
items.what_zh: KRX 即時股價 — 市場對記憶體超級循環的即時判讀。僅屬情緒情境，排除在定價權分數之外。

estimates.method_en: HBM revenue run-rate (derived from disclosed share math)
estimates.method_zh: HBM 營收年化（由揭露的比例推導）
estimates.basis_en: SK hynix reports NO HBM line. Derivation: total revenue run-rate ~$78B (annualized, KRW→USD) × DRAM ~80% of revenue ≈ $62B × HBM ~40% of DRAM revenue (management commentary) ≈ mid-$20Bs — carried at $25B, an ESTIMATE built from three disclosed/commented ratios. This is the revenue of the platform's binding constraint (對齊 /bottleneck 2026-07-02).
estimates.basis_zh: SK海力士沒有 HBM 揭露項。推導：總營收年化約 $78B（年化、韓元→美元）× DRAM 約占營收 80% ≈ $62B × HBM 約占 DRAM 營收 40%（管理層評論）≈ $25B 上下 — 取 $25B，為由三個揭露/評論比例組成的估計值。這正是平台綁定約束的營收（對齊 /bottleneck 2026-07-02）。

estimates.method_zh: 總營收年化（揭露值，年化韓元→美元）
estimates.basis_en: Annualizing the most recent disclosed quarter (~₩27T-class) at ~₩1,400/USD gives a ~$78B total run-rate — the disclosed anchor under the HBM derivation. Only the annualization and FX conversion are mechanical projections; the quarter itself is reported.
estimates.basis_zh: 把最近一季揭露值（約 ₩27T 級）以約 ₩1,400/USD 年化，得總營收年化約 $78B — HBM 推導底下的揭露錨點。年化與匯率換算是機械性推算；季度本身為申報值。

estimates.method_zh: HBM 營業利益視角（利潤率估計）
estimates.basis_en: Analyst-class estimates put HBM operating margin near ~55-60% given negotiated LTA pricing — on a $25B run-rate that annualizes to ~$14B of operating income. Doubly estimated (revenue derived, margin estimated); a directional lens on how profitable owning the constraint is, not a reported figure.
estimates.basis_zh: 分析師級估計認為在議定 LTA 價格下 HBM 營業利益率約 55-60% — 以 $25B 年化計約 $14B 營業利益。雙重估計（營收為推導、利潤率為估計）；用來看「擁有約束有多賺」的方向性視角，非申報數字。

benefit.disclosure_note_en: SK hynix disclosures give total and DRAM revenue plus 'HBM ≈ 40% of DRAM revenue' commentary — but NO HBM segment line exists. The ~$25B headline is DERIVED from those disclosed ratios, an estimate cross-checked against the disclosed $78B total run-rate and an op-income lens.
benefit.disclosure_note_zh: SK海力士的揭露給出總營收、DRAM 營收與「HBM 約占 DRAM 營收 40%」的評論 — 但不存在 HBM 分部揭露項。~$25B 頭條是由這些揭露比例「推導」的估計值，並以揭露的 $78B 總營收年化與營益視角交叉驗證。

chain.accelerator_en: HBM4 (12-hi, base die on TSMC logic)
chain.accelerator_zh: HBM4（12層，base die 走台積電邏輯製程）
chain.role_en: Next-gen HBM for Rubin / MI400-class accelerators
chain.role_zh: 供 Rubin／MI400 級加速器的次世代 HBM
chain.node: 1c DRAM (EUV) + TSMC logic base die (node EST)
chain.note_en: The one thread where SK hynix IS a TSMC customer: from HBM4 the base die moves to a foundry logic process under the 2024 TSMC partnership (announced-class, T2). DRAM core dies stay in SK hynix's own fabs.
chain.note_zh: SK海力士唯一「成為台積電客戶」的一條線：自 HBM4 起，base die 依 2024 年與台積電的合作移到代工邏輯製程（公告級，T2）。DRAM 核心晶粒仍留在 SK海力士自家晶圓廠。

chain.note_en: The volume product of the constraint: lead supplier position on NVIDIA's newest accelerators. Never touches a TSMC fab — but every stack is consumed on a TSMC CoWoS interposer.
chain.note_zh: 約束的量產主力：在 NVIDIA 最新加速器上居主力供應商地位。從不進台積電晶圓廠 — 但每個堆疊都在台積電 CoWoS 中介層上被消耗。

chain.accelerator_zh: CoWoS 上的 HBM（GB200/GB300 · MI355X · TPU）
chain.role_en: Where the stacks are consumed — the complement link
chain.role_zh: 堆疊被消耗之處 — 互補環節
chain.note_en: The mutual gate: TSMC CoWoS capacity and SK hynix HBM supply cap EACH OTHER — /bottleneck finds HBM binding at 1.72M B200-eq accelerators/qtr (對齊 /bottleneck 2026-07-02), and /racks itemizes the stacks per rack. Neither side ships without the other.
chain.note_zh: 互相把關：台積電 CoWoS 產能與 SK海力士 HBM 供給互為上限 — /bottleneck 判定 HBM 綁定在每季 172 萬顆 B200 當量（對齊 /bottleneck 2026-07-02），/racks 則逐櫃列出堆疊用量。缺了任何一邊，另一邊都出不了貨。

chain.note_en: The generation that built the HBM lead — first to qualify at NVIDIA in volume, establishing the qualification moat the current allocation power rests on.
chain.note_zh: 建立 HBM 領先的一代 — 最早在 NVIDIA 大規模通過驗證，奠定了今日配額權力所依賴的驗證護城河。

chain.role_zh: AI 伺服器主記憶體＋外溢槓桿
chain.note_en: Every AI server carries TBs of host DRAM; HBM's wafer absorption tightens this market too. Also the first line CXMT attacks (/geo second-chain read, 對齊 2026-07-02).
chain.note_zh: 每台 AI 伺服器都載著數 TB 主記憶體；HBM 吸走晶圓也讓這個市場變緊。同時是 CXMT 最先進攻的產品線（/geo 第二供應鏈判讀，對齊 2026-07-02）。

chain.role_en: AI data-lake storage — the weak lever
chain.role_zh: AI 資料湖儲存 — 弱槓桿
chain.note_en: AI lifts high-capacity eSSD demand, but NAND lacks HBM's qualification moat — included for honesty; it dilutes the blended pricing story.
chain.note_zh: AI 拉動大容量 eSSD 需求，但 NAND 沒有 HBM 的驗證護城河 — 為誠實而列入；它稀釋混合定價故事。

silicon.tsmc_read_en: SK hynix is a COMPLEMENT, not a customer — 互補而非客戶, unique among the seven lenses. Its DRAM stacks come from its own fabs (~15% TSMC exposure, EST, via the HBM4 base die on TSMC logic under the 2024 partnership). Yet no TSMC CoWoS interposer ships without HBM and no HBM stack earns without CoWoS: the two gate EACH OTHER, and /bottleneck names HBM the binding constraint on deliverable compute (1.72M B200-eq/qtr, 對齊 /bottleneck 2026-07-02). The Liebig insight for a foundry CEO: SK hynix's capacity ramp (M15X, Yongin) RELIEVES the platform's binding constraint — its capex is the one outside TSMC's walls that most directly monetizes TSMC's own CoWoS buildout, while CXMT (/geo) is the shared long-run threat.
silicon.tsmc_read_zh: SK海力士是互補者、不是客戶 — 互補而非客戶，七個鏡頭中獨一無二。其 DRAM 堆疊出自自家晶圓廠（台積電曝險約 15%，估計，來自 2024 年合作下走台積電邏輯製程的 HBM4 base die）。但沒有 HBM，台積電的 CoWoS 中介層出不了貨；沒有 CoWoS，HBM 堆疊也賺不到錢：兩者互相把關，而 /bottleneck 判定 HBM 是可交付算力的綁定約束（每季 172 萬顆 B200 當量，對齊 /bottleneck 2026-07-02）。給晶圓代工 CEO 的 Liebig 洞見：SK海力士的產能爬坡（M15X、龍仁）「紓解」的正是平台的綁定約束 — 它是台積電牆外最直接把台積電自家 CoWoS 擴建變現的 capex，而 CXMT（/geo）是雙方共同的長期威脅。

proxies.name_zh: NVIDIA（NVDA）— 錨定客戶需求 proxy
美光（MU）— HBM 競爭 proxy

alerts.en: Realized-price engine running hot: pricing-power score 71.4/100 — the HBM3E→HBM4 generational ASP ladder plus sold-out, LTA-locked allocation are doing the work — the constraint's owner prices the queue rather than chasing it, though memory cyclicality and Samsung/Micron/CXMT catch-up cap how far.
alerts.zh: 已實現價格引擎火熱：定價權分數 71.4/100 — HBM3E→HBM4 世代 ASP 階梯加上售罄、LTA 鎖定的配額在推動 — 約束的擁有者替排隊的人定價、而非追價，但記憶體循環性與三星/美光/CXMT 追趕限制其上限。

alerts.en: GPU-scarcity proxy cooling: NVDA -13.12%/m — watch the accelerator-scarcity premium (capacity-block pricing) for follow-through.
alerts.zh: GPU 稀缺 proxy 降溫：NVDA -13.12%/月 — 留意加速器稀缺溢價（capacity-block 定價）是否跟跌。

alerts.en: AI benefit (headline est.) ≈ $25.0B revenue_runrate — SK hynix disclosures give total and DRAM revenue plus 'HBM ≈ 40% of DRAM revenue' commentary — but NO HBM segment line exists. The ~$25B headline is DERIVED from those disclosed ratios, an estimate cross-checked against the disclosed $78B total run-rate and an op-income lens.
alerts.zh: AI 利益（頭條估計）≈ $25.0B revenue_runrate — SK海力士的揭露給出總營收、DRAM 營收與「HBM 約占 DRAM 營收 40%」的評論 — 但不存在 HBM 分部揭露項。~$25B 頭條是由這些揭露比例「推導」的估計值，並以揭露的 $78B 總營收年化與營益視角交叉驗證。

integrated_thesis.en: SK hynix is the constraint's owner in AI memory: it prices the queue rather than chasing it. The realized-price engine is the HBM3E-12hi→HBM4 generational ASP ladder (~50-60% premiums) layered on sold-out, LTA-locked 2026 allocation — score 71.4, verdict RAISING. AI benefit runs at a derived ~$25B HBM revenue run-rate inside a disclosed $78B total, with a low-confidence ~$14B op-income lens. For TSMC the hook is twofold and tightening: HBM4 base dies migrate onto TSMC logic (direct advanced-node pull), and every HBM stack lands on TSMC CoWoS interposers (indirect via NVIDIA/AMD/Google). ~15% TSMC-fabbed today, but the base-die shift raises that structurally.
integrated_thesis.zh: SK海力士是AI記憶體瓶頸的擁有者:對排隊定價而非追價。實現價引擎為HBM3E 12層→HBM4的世代ASP階梯(溢價約50-60%),疊加已售罄、LTA鎖定的2026產能——評分71.4,判定「拉升中」。AI效益以推導的HBM營收約250億美元運行,嵌於已揭露780億美元總營收中,另有低信心約140億美元營業利益視角。對台積電意義雙重且趨緊:HBM4基底晶粒移往台積電邏輯製程(直接先進製程拉動),且每顆HBM堆疊皆落於台積電CoWoS中介層(經NVIDIA/AMD/Google間接)。今約15%由台積電代工,基底晶粒轉移將結構性推升此占比。

pricing.en: Score 71.4, RAISING. Top lever is the HBM generational ASP ladder (strength 86): each node HBM3E-12hi→HBM4 carries a 50-60% premium regardless of falling $/bit list trend. Reinforced by Tier-1 sold-out allocation power (84) — 2026 capacity gone under year-ahead LTAs, letting hynix price the queue. Conventional-DRAM spillover (76) adds as AI absorbs wafers. Cap: memory cyclicality plus Samsung/Micron/CXMT catch-up (40, negative) limits how far. NAND/Solidigm remains the honestly weak lever (50).
pricing.zh: 評分71.4,拉升中。首要槓桿為HBM世代ASP階梯(強度86):每一世代HBM3E 12層→HBM4帶來50-60%溢價,無視每位元價下滑。第一級售罄配置力(84)強化之——2026產能於年前LTA下售罄,得以對排隊定價。傳統DRAM外溢(76)因AI吸走晶圓而加碼。上限:記憶體週期性加上三星/美光/長鑫追趕(40,負向)。NAND/Solidigm仍為誠實的弱槓桿(50)。

sources.en: Highest signal: DART/KRX quarterly filings for the disclosed $78B total and the 'HBM ≈ 40% of DRAM' commentary that anchors the derived HBM number — there is NO HBM segment line. Earnings-call LTA/prepayment disclosures confirm the sold-out lever; TrendForce/Counterpoint for HBM share and DRAM contract/spot indices; TechInsights teardowns for die attribution and base-die node; capex/fab tracking (M15X, Yongin) for supply. Cross-check NVDA/MU proxies for scarcity-premium follow-through only.
sources.zh: 最高訊號:DART/KRX季報揭露780億美元總營收及「HBM約占DRAM營收40%」的敘述,錨定推導的HBM數字——並無HBM分部項。法說會LTA/預付款揭露確認售罄槓桿;TrendForce/Counterpoint看HBM市占與DRAM合約/現貨指數;TechInsights拆解確認晶粒歸屬與基底晶粒製程;資本支出/建廠追蹤(M15X、龍仁)看供給。NVDA/MU代理僅用於交叉確認稀缺溢價延續。

benefit.en: Headline ~$25B HBM revenue run-rate is an ESTIMATE, not a reported line: derived from the disclosed $78B total run-rate (high confidence, T1) times the 'HBM ≈ 40% of DRAM' ratio (medium confidence, T2), cross-checked against a low-confidence ~$14B op-income lens (T3). Consensus sits at the same $25B. Treat the total as fact and the HBM split as a well-triangulated inference — never quote it as disclosed.
benefit.zh: 約250億美元HBM營收運行為估計值,非揭露項:由已揭露780億美元總運行(高信心,T1)乘以「HBM約占DRAM 40%」比率(中信心,T2)推導,並以低信心約140億美元營業利益視角(T3)交叉驗證。市場共識同為250億美元。將總額視為事實,HBM拆分視為三角驗證推論——切勿當作揭露數字引用。

silicon.en: ~15% TSMC-fabbed with 3 critical links. The structural shift: HBM4 base die moves from in-house to TSMC logic process — hynix DRAM (1c/EUV) stays captive but the base die becomes a direct TSMC advanced-node customer. Every HBM3E/HBM4 stack then mounts on TSMC CoWoS-L/S interposers under GB200/GB300, MI355X and TPU — indirect exposure via the accelerator makers. Advanced MR-MUF / hybrid-bonding at hynix; interposer at TSMC. This is CoWoS-HBM mutual gating in physical form.
silicon.zh: 約15%由台積電代工,3條關鍵鏈。結構性轉變:HBM4基底晶粒由自製移往台積電邏輯製程——海力士DRAM(1c/EUV)仍自產,但基底晶粒成為台積電直接先進製程客戶。每顆HBM3E/HBM4堆疊再裝於台積電CoWoS-L/S中介層,搭載於GB200/GB300、MI355X與TPU——經加速器廠間接曝險。先進MR-MUF/混合鍵合在海力士,中介層在台積電。此即CoWoS-HBM互相閘控的實體體現。

tsmc_implication.en: Both direct and indirect — and the balance is tilting toward direct. Today the dominant tie is indirect: hynix HBM stacks consume TSMC CoWoS interposer capacity on every leading-edge accelerator, making the two mutual gates on deliverable compute (Liebig minimum). But HBM4's base die migrating onto TSMC logic converts hynix into a direct advanced-node customer for the first time at scale. Binding constraint: CoWoS-HBM co-gating — whichever ramps slower sets shippable AI compute, so TSMC packaging throughput and hynix stack yield must be planned as one coupled system, not two.
tsmc_implication.zh: 直接與間接兼具——且天平正倒向直接。當前主導為間接:海力士HBM堆疊消耗每顆先進加速器上的台積電CoWoS中介層產能,使雙方成為可交付算力的互相閘門(李比希最小值)。但HBM4基底晶粒移往台積電邏輯製程,首度使海力士成為規模化的直接先進製程客戶。約束點:CoWoS-HBM共同閘控——較慢者決定可出貨AI算力,故台積電封裝產出與海力士堆疊良率須視為單一耦合系統規劃,而非兩者分立。

scenarios.trigger_en: HBM4 ramps on schedule at 50-60% premium, hynix holds ≥50% HBM share, 2027 capacity re-sells out under LTAs, DRAM contract prices stay elevated.
scenarios.trigger_zh: HBM4如期以50-60%溢價量產,海力士維持≥50%HBM市占,2027產能於LTA下再度售罄,DRAM合約價維持高位。

scenarios.trigger_en: TSMC CoWoS and hynix HBM each cap the other; deliverable compute set by slower ramp, demand stays unmet, both hold pricing — volume not price is the constraint.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 台積電CoWoS與海力士HBM互相封頂;可交付算力由較慢者決定,需求持續未滿足,雙方維持定價——約束為量而非價。

scenarios.trigger_en: Co-designed HBM4 base dies on TSMC logic convert commodity stacks into socketed parts; per-stack value capture rises even as commodity DRAM cools.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 台積電邏輯製程上共同設計的HBM4基底晶粒將商品堆疊轉為插槽化零件;即使商品DRAM降溫,每堆疊價值捕獲仍上升。

scenarios.trigger_en: Samsung requalifies HBM4 at scale and Micron ramps while CXMT floods DRAM; AI capex digests, HBM premiums compress, 2027 sold-out lever fails to renew.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 三星規模化HBM4通過認證、美光放量、長鑫傾銷DRAM;AI資本支出消化,HBM溢價壓縮,2027售罄槓桿未能續約。

falsification.en: Samsung passes NVIDIA HBM4 qualification at volume and takes ≥30% share within two quarters — the sold-out/pricing-the-queue lever breaks and ASP ladder flattens.
falsification.zh: 三星於兩季內大量通過NVIDIA HBM4認證並取得≥30%市占——售罄/對排隊定價槓桿瓦解,ASP階梯走平。

falsification.en: DRAM contract prices reverse >20% QoQ while HBM premium narrows below ~30%, showing AI capex digestion rather than structural tightness.
falsification.zh: DRAM合約價季減逾20%且HBM溢價收窄至約30%以下,顯示AI資本支出消化而非結構性緊俏。

falsification.en: 2027 LTA renewals slip or reprice downward, indicating hynix has lost queue-pricing power to catch-up supply.
falsification.zh: 2027 LTA續約延後或向下重定價,顯示海力士對排隊定價力已流失於追趕供給。

watch.en: NVDA/MU sentiment proxies for accelerator-scarcity premium follow-through (currently NVDA -13%/m, MU -9%/m).
watch.zh: NVDA/MU情緒代理,追蹤加速器稀缺溢價延續(目前NVDA月-13%、MU月-9%)。

watch.en: TrendForce DRAM/HBM contract & spot price indices for premium and cyclicality inflection.
watch.zh: TrendForce DRAM/HBM合約與現貨價指數,觀察溢價與週期轉折。

watch.en: HBM4 qualification news at NVIDIA/AMD — Samsung/Micron pass events that erode hynix share.
watch.zh: NVIDIA/AMD的HBM4認證消息——三星/美光通過事件將侵蝕海力士市占。

watch.en: SK hynix earnings-call LTA/prepayment disclosures and 2026/2027 sold-out status.
watch.zh: SK海力士法說會LTA/預付款揭露及2026/2027售罄狀態。

watch.en: DART/KRX filings: total run-rate and 'HBM % of DRAM' commentary anchoring the derived $25B.
watch.zh: DART/KRX季報:總營收運行與『HBM占DRAM%』敘述,錨定推導的250億美元。

watch.en: TechInsights teardowns confirming HBM4 base-die node and TSMC attribution (direct-exposure signal).
watch.zh: TechInsights拆解確認HBM4基底晶粒製程與台積電歸屬(直接曝險訊號)。

watch.en: TSMC CoWoS capacity guidance vs hynix stack output — the mutual-gating balance point.
watch.zh: 台積電CoWoS產能指引對比海力士堆疊產出——互相閘控的平衡點。

cross_links.label_en: Bottleneck Radar — HBM is the binding constraint (1.72M B200-eq/qtr); this is the company that owns it
cross_links.label_zh: 瓶頸雷達 — HBM 是綁定約束（每季 172 萬顆 B200 當量）；這就是擁有它的公司

cross_links.label_en: Rack BOM Radar — the HBM stacks per rack that SK hynix supplies
cross_links.label_zh: 機櫃 BOM 雷達 — SK海力士供應的每櫃 HBM 用量

cross_links.label_en: Geo second-chain — CXMT, the China catch-up threat in the HBM link
cross_links.label_zh: 地緣第二供應鏈 — CXMT，HBM 環節的中國追趕威脅

cross_links.label_en: Pricing Power Radar — the memory premium inside the same price stack
cross_links.label_zh: 議價能力雷達 — 同一價格堆疊內的記憶體溢價

cross_links.label_en: NVIDIA lens — the anchor customer whose accelerators consume these stacks
cross_links.label_zh: NVIDIA 鏡頭 — 消耗這些堆疊的錨定客戶

blind_spots_en: SK hynix reports NO HBM segment line — the ~$25B headline is DERIVED from total revenue × DRAM share × HBM-share-of-DRAM commentary; each ratio moves quarter to quarter.
HBM market share (~50-60%) and the HBM4 price premium (~50-60%) are third-party / press estimates — no vendor discloses either.

The ~15% TSMC-exposure figure is an ESTIMATE of the TSMC-fabbed share of AI-relevant silicon value (HBM4 base die + interposer linkage), not a disclosed number; base-die node attribution is announced-class, not confirmed at part level.
LTA prepayment/take-or-pay structures are press-reported (T3); actual contract terms are confidential.
KRW→USD conversion (~₩1,400/USD) moves the dollar run-rate; live 000660.KS / NVDA / MU proxies are sentiment context, kept out of the pricing-power score.
blind_spots_zh: SK海力士沒有 HBM 分部揭露項 — ~$25B 頭條是由總營收 × DRAM 占比 × HBM 占 DRAM 比例的評論「推導」而來；每個比例逐季變動。
HBM 市占（約 50-60%）與 HBM4 溢價（約 50-60%）皆為第三方／媒體估計 — 沒有任何廠商揭露。
台積電曝險約 15% 為對 AI 相關矽價值中台積電製造占比的估計（HBM4 base die＋中介層連結），非揭露數字；base die 節點歸因為公告級、未在零件層級確認。
LTA 預付／take-or-pay 結構為媒體報導（T3）；實際合約條款屬機密。
韓元→美元換算（約 ₩1,400/USD）會移動美元年化；即時 000660.KS／NVDA／MU proxy 為情緒情境，排除在定價權分數之外。
